## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change and its motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement (rules, process, output format)
- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect skill behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other

## Skill(s) affected

- [ ] swing-clarify
- [ ] swing-research
- [ ] swing-review
- [ ] swing-options
- [ ] swing-trace
- [ ] swing-mortem
- [ ] None (framework/docs change)

## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `allowed-tools`)
- [ ] Rules section uses absolute language (no ambiguity)
- [ ] BAD and GOOD quality calibration examples included (for new/changed skills)
- [ ] Integration Notes section updated if skill interactions changed
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI platform (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include:
- Platform used (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
- Example prompt(s) used
- Summary of output quality

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific to look at or known limitations.
